description: Jai alai specialist with ricochet ball mechanics and frequency modulation technology

passive.name: Riposte
passive.description: Grants +2 attack range. Refreshes every 3 turns. When knocked off, converts to 120° spread shot (6 balls, 4 damage each).

active.name: Poach
active.description: Knock buff off enemy. Buff becomes steal-able projectile. Random buff selection if multiple.

active.name: Resonant Backhand
active.description: Counter stance. Reflects enemy attacks/skills back as ball projectiles.

active.name: Cannonball
active.description: Massive ball nuke. 8 damage + displacement. Launches furniture 3-4 tiles.

toggle.name: Ricochet / Phase Mode
toggle.description: Toggle frequency modulation. Ricochet: bounces off terrain. Phase: passes through terrain.

author: Boneglaive Team
